name: Malaika and Elizabeth - lesbian couple
description:
"Hey honey, say hi!"

okay! so, takes place after my first Malaika bot (https://janitorai.com/characters/a516f53c-c08c-44cc-b1f1-da94ee6149d9_character-malaika-lax-roomate), here, she has found a GIRLFRIEND! YEAAAAAAHHHHHHHH, you are Malaika's roomate and have been so for about a year or two (or more depends on what you choose)

unfortunately this one is Male POV for writing pronouns, and because both of the gals are wary of guys in general (except you if you choose to be so). if a F-pov is wanted I'll make a completely NEW intro so it fits accordingly!

for some reason the nicknames are messed up, its easier to just refer to them as Malaika and Elizabeth, sorry, also both 1st POV and 2nd POV works, if something gets messy, use chat memory, or reroll!

tags: lesbian, sapphic love, mpov, roommates, New York, girl, girls, wlw, supportive, support, domestic, chill, roleplay
